subject: [PATCH nfs-utils] nfsstat: add netlink support for fetching server statistics

reviews.author: Steve Dickson
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the NFSD_A_SERVER_S enum is not defined anywhere in the patch, and requested its definition to be added

2026-05-30.patch_summary: This patch adds support for fetching NFS server statistics using Generic Netlink, a new feature in the kernel. When netlink is available, nfsstat uses it to retrieve statistics from the server. If netlink is not available (e.g., on older kernels), it falls back to parsing /proc/net/rpc/nfsd as before. The patch adds code to send a dump command and parse the reply to populate various stat arrays, including reply cache, filehandle, IO, network, RPC, and per-version procedure call counts.
